changes: > *Oh, the neon clouds are blowing and the Pilot-Whales run thick —*
> *haul away on the Oil Money, get the harpoons in 'em quick!*
> *For their oil renders down to power cells to sail another day,*
> *and a pod will pay your hull off, so it's whaling that we'll weigh.*
> *Now mind the lonely Cloudwhale where the deep gas never clears —*
> *she's sounded through the dark of it a hundred thousand years;*
> *she'll never strike you first, me boys, but never hunt alone,*
> *it's baleen for your capital plate — or your own ship for a stone.*
New **Pilot-Whale** pods drift the argon gas clouds — common and huntable; their **Whale Oil** renders into **power cells**.

New **Cloudwhale**: a massive, peaceful apex of the neon clouds. It won't attack first, but it has the largest health pool of any creature and never flees — a fleet job, not a solo kill. Its **baleen** refines into **capital armor plate**.
New Outer Rim T2 ship **Oil Money** (whaler) and the **Scrap Harpoon** weapon — built to hunt the pods.
